name: io.github.The-40-Thieves/obsidian-tc
title: Obsidian Turbocharged
description: Model-agnostic, agent-ready Obsidian MCP server with RBAC, SLSA provenance, and native search.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_TC_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the obsidian-tc JSON config (vaults, ACL, transports). May also be passed as the first CLI argument.

environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_TC_DEFAULT_VAULT
environmentVariables.description: Optional id of the vault to bind tool calls to when a request omits one.
